Package eu.algites.lib.common.enums.uiddata

Type Parameters:

All Known Implementing Classes:
AIrUidPartMetadata
public interface AIiUidPartMetadata<O extends AIiUidEnumDataOrigin>

Title: AIiUidPartMetadata

Description: General interface for the Uid parts metadata

20.01.26 7:47

    Method

    Supplier<String>
    displayLabelSupplier()
    Supplier of Label to be displayed in the UI

    Whether the field value is required

  • Method Details

    • displayLabelSupplier

      Supplier<String> displayLabelSupplier()
      Supplier of Label to be displayed in the UI
      Returns:
      label

    • requiredForOrigin

      Map<O,Boolean> requiredForOrigin()
      Whether the field value is required
      Returns:
      Map, where as key is the origina and value if the given field for the origin is required. So contains true if required for origin for which the requirability has to be evaluated, false otherwise. In the case the givne origin is unspecified in the map, then as default is taken Boolean.FALSE. If the Origin is specified in the map with null as the bool value, then NullPointerException is thrown.
